recipes.name: To'yona palov
instructions: Suv quying, zira soling va qaynating
Guruchni tekis qilib soling, 40 daqiqa pishiring

recipes.name: Afg'on palovi
instructions: Go'sht va mayiz bilan qatlam qiling

recipes.name: Qo'qon palovi
instructions: Piyoz va go'shtni kuchli olovda qovuring

recipes.name: Hindiston biryani
instructions: Tovuqni yogurt va ziravorlarda marinad qiling

recipes.name: Chuchvara sho'rva
instructions: Xamir qorib yupqa yoyib chuchvara yasang

recipes.name: Tom yam
instructions: Limon sharbati va baliq sousini soling

recipes.name: Solyanka
instructions: Suv quying, bodring va zaytun soling

recipes.name: Tuxum kabob
instructions: Qiymani tuxum ustiga o'rab sixga tizing

recipes.name: Mol go'sht steak
instructions: Qizdirilgan skovorodada har tomoni 3-4 daqiqa pishiring

recipes.name: Tabule salati
instructions: Limon sharbati va zaytun moyi quying

recipes.name: Obi non
instructions: Non shakl bering va chekich bilan turing

recipes.name: Kartoshkali somsa
instructions: Kartoshkani mayda to'g'rab piyoz bilan aralashtiring

recipes.name: Medovik
instructions: Asal va sariyog'ni eritib shakar soling
Tuxum va un qo'shib xamir qoring

recipes.name: Chak-chak
instructions: Asalni shakar bilan qaynatib sous qiling

recipes.name: Cheesecake
instructions: Tvorog, shakar, tuxum aralashtirib ustiga quying

recipes.name: Blini
instructions: Sut va un solib suyuq xamir qiling

recipes.name: Mochi
instructions: Kraxmal ustida yoyib ichiga past soling

recipes.name: Pelmenlar
instructions: Xamirni yoyib doira kesib ichiga qiyma soling

recipes.name: Spagetti karbonara
instructions: Makaronni pekon bilan aralashtiring va tuxumli sousni quying

recipes.name: Syrniki
instructions: Tvorogni tuxum, shakar, un bilan aralashtiring

recipes.name: Butter chicken
instructions: Tovuq va qaymoq solib 20 daqiqa pishiring

recipes.name: Tovuq tabaka
instructions: Og'ir narsa bilan bosib tavada qovuring

recipes.name: Pho bo
instructions: Bulyon quying va yupqa go'sht soling

recipes.name: Eggs Benedict
instructions: Sirka solingan suvda tuxumni poshe qiling
Nonga vetclina, tuxum qo'yib sous quying

recipes.name: Gyoza
instructions: Suv quying va qopqoq yopib bug'lang

recipes.name: Churros
instructions: Suv va sariyog'ni qaynatib un soling

recipes.name: Nachos
instructions: Pishloq seping va pechda eritib oling

recipes.name: Nuggets
instructions: Unga, tuxumga, suharikiga navbat bilan botibing

recipes.name: Tvorojnaya zapekanka
instructions: Tvorogni tuxum va shakar bilan aralashtiring

recipes.name: Krevetkali tempura
instructions: Xamirni un, tuxum va muzli suvdan qoring

recipes.name: Eclair
instructions: Suv va sariyog'ni qaynating, un soling

recipes.name: Gnocchi
instructions: Un va tuxum solib xamir qoring

recipes.name: Ravioli
instructions: Tuxum va undan xamir qorib yoying

recipes.name: Manpar
instructions: Xamir qorib kichik bo'laklarga uzib oling
